item.title: You don't need a build system to have nice code blocks
item.description: Syntax highlighting, callouts, and typeset code. All static. All free.

item.title: Navigation is not a design problem, it's a list of links
item.description: You do not need a hamburger menu. You have five pages.

item.title: Your single-page website is a pamphlet
item.description: One page is a statement. Multiple pages are a commitment. Make the commitment.
